task_objective: Fix missing correlations and null matrices in full report
design_decisions: Broadened correlation inclusion: Boolean and low-cardinality Integer columns (even if reclassified as Categorical) are now included in correlation matrices.
Previously, reclassification to 'Categorical' (heuristic < 20 distinct values) excluded columns from Numeric-only correlation passes.
Updated varied data script to ensure higher cardinality and varied missingness for better heatmap/correlation testing.
results: Verified that Pearson, Spearman, and Nullity heatmaps are correctly generated for financial-style datasets.
